rationale: 20 untagged COINTREV_meanrev (idea 91, v1, retired 2026-05-21 commit 605317c) Baskets rows dropped DB-side per CLAUDE.md Invariant #2 operator-cleanup exception (disk artifacts gone, cohort 19 FAIL + 1 CORE). Hard-DELETE from basket_sheet then ledger_db.py --export + format_excel_artifact --profile portfolio; MPS Baskets 247 -> 227, 29 RETIRED + 60 SUPERSEDED preserved via _MPS_AUDIT_COLUMNS carry-over. test_deprecated_rules_have_all_mps_rows_tagged now PASSes. Also fixed pre-existing Windows file-handle bug in ledger_db.py export_mps (WinError 5 on os.replace, surfaced by chip-task 03db5ca's new in-process test_drop_orphan_basket_row_survives_re_export): _merge_audit_columns now uses explicit pd.ExcelFile context manager + os.replace gets gc.collect() + retry-with-backoff (50/100/200/400/800ms) per feedback_workbook_lifecycle_remediation pattern. Baseline 17 -> 16.
